sentences.sentence: There are few places in the world where relations between agriculture and conservation are more strained.
sentences.translation: 世界上很少有地方，农业与自然保护之间的关系会如此紧张。

structure.text: There are few places in the world
where relations between agriculture and conservation are more strained

difficult_points: There are few places 是存在句结构，few 表示“几乎没有多少”。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 places，说明这些地方的特征。
relations between agriculture and conservation 是从句主语，between 短语限定两者之间的关系。

sentences.sentence: Madagascar's forests are being converted to agricultural land at a rate of one percent every year.
sentences.translation: 马达加斯加的森林正以每年百分之一的速度被转变为农业用地。

structure.text: at a rate of one percent every year

difficult_points: are being converted 是现在进行时的被动语态，强调森林正在持续被改变用途。
to agricultural land 表示转变后的结果。
at a rate of one percent every year 说明变化速度，是理解破坏规模的关键信息。

sentences.sentence: Much of this destruction is fuelled by the cultivation of the country's main staple crop: rice.
sentences.translation: 这种破坏在很大程度上是由该国主要主食作物——水稻——的种植推动的。

structure.text: by the cultivation of the country's main staple crop: rice
of the country's main staple crop

difficult_points: Much of this destruction 指前文森林被转为农地这一破坏。
is fuelled by 是被动结构，fuelled 表示“被推动、被加剧”。
冒号后的 rice 具体说明 main staple crop 是什么。

sentences.sentence: And a key reason for this destruction is that insect pests are destroying vast quantities of what is grown by local subsistence farmers, leading them to clear forest to create new paddy fields.
sentences.translation: 而造成这种破坏的一个关键原因是，害虫正在毁掉当地自给型农民种植的大量作物，迫使他们清理森林来开辟新的稻田。

structure.text: a key reason for this destruction
that insect pests are destroying vast quantities of what is grown by local subsistence farmers
what is grown by local subsistence farmers
leading them to clear forest to create new paddy fields

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，解释 a key reason 的具体内容。
what is grown by local subsistence farmers 是宾语从句，指当地农民所种植的作物。
leading them to... 是现在分词结果状语，说明害虫破坏造成农民清林造田。

sentences.sentence: The result is devastating habitat and biodiversity loss on the island, but not all species are suffering.
sentences.translation: 其结果是岛上栖息地和生物多样性遭受严重损失，但并非所有物种都在受害。

structure.text: devastating habitat and biodiversity loss on the island
but not all species are suffering

difficult_points: devastating 修饰 habitat and biodiversity loss，表示损失程度严重。
but 连接两个并列分句，后半句引出转折。
not all species 是部分否定，意思是“并非所有物种”。

sentences.sentence: In fact, some of the island's insectivorous bats are currently thriving and this has important implications for farmers and conservationists alike.
sentences.translation: 事实上，岛上一些食虫蝙蝠目前正繁盛起来，而这对农民和自然保护者都有重要意义。

structure.text: some of the island's insectivorous bats are currently thriving
some of the island's insectivorous bats
and this has important implications for farmers and conservationists alike

difficult_points: In fact 承接前一句转折，具体说明有些物种反而受益。
this 指代某些食虫蝙蝠正在繁盛这一情况。
alike 表示“双方都一样”，说明这种影响同时关系到农民和保护者。

sentences.sentence: Enter University of Cambridge zoologist Ricardo Rocha.
sentences.translation: 此时，剑桥大学动物学家里卡多·罗查登场了。

structure.text: University of Cambridge zoologist Ricardo Rocha

difficult_points: Enter 位于句首是类似舞台提示的倒装表达，用来引入新人物。
University of Cambridge zoologist Ricardo Rocha 是主语，说明人物身份和姓名。
zoologist 与 Ricardo Rocha 构成同位关系，即罗查是一名动物学家。

sentences.sentence: He's passionate about conservation, and bats.
sentences.translation: 他热衷于自然保护，也热爱蝙蝠。
difficult_points: He's 是 He is 的缩写，指上一句的 Ricardo Rocha。
passionate about 后接两个并列对象：conservation 和 bats。
逗号后的 and bats 有强调效果，突出他对蝙蝠的兴趣。

sentences.sentence: More specifically, he's interested in how bats are responding to human activity and deforestation in particular.
sentences.translation: 更具体地说，他感兴趣的是蝙蝠如何应对人类活动，尤其是森林砍伐。

structure.text: how bats are responding to human activity and deforestation in particular
bats are responding to human activity and deforestation

difficult_points: More specifically 用来把研究兴趣从泛泛的保护和蝙蝠缩小到具体问题。
how 引导名词性从句，作 interested in 的宾语。
in particular 特别强调 deforestation 是 human activity 中重点关注的一类。

sentences.sentence: Rocha's new study shows that several species of bats are giving Madagascar's rice farmers a vital pest control service by feasting on plagues of insects.
sentences.translation: 罗查的新研究表明，几种蝙蝠正通过大量捕食成灾的昆虫，为马达加斯加稻农提供重要的害虫控制服务。

structure.text: that several species of bats are giving Madagascar's rice farmers a vital pest control service by feasting on plagues of insects
by feasting on plagues of insects

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明研究显示的内容。
are giving 是现在进行时，强调这些蝙蝠正在提供服务。
by feasting on... 表示提供害虫控制服务的方式。

sentences.sentence: And this, he believes, can ease the financial pressure on farmers to turn forest into fields.
sentences.translation: 而他认为，这可以缓解农民把森林变成农田的经济压力。

structure.text: the financial pressure on farmers to turn forest into fields

difficult_points: this 指代蝙蝠提供害虫控制服务这一现象。
he believes 是插入语，不影响主句 this can ease... 的结构。
to turn forest into fields 修饰 pressure，说明压力推动农民做什么。

sentences.sentence: Bats comprise roughly one-fifth of all mammal species in Madagascar and thirty-six recorded bat species are native to the island, making it one of the most important regions for conservation of this animal group anywhere in the world.
sentences.translation: 在马达加斯加，蝙蝠约占所有哺乳动物物种的五分之一，且已有记录的三十六种蝙蝠原产于该岛，这使它成为全球保护这一动物类群最重要的地区之一。

structure.text: Bats comprise roughly one-fifth of all mammal species in Madagascar
and thirty-six recorded bat species are native to the island
making it one of the most important regions for conservation of this animal group anywhere in the world
one of the most important regions
for conservation of this animal group anywhere in the world

difficult_points: 句子由 and 连接两个并列分句，分别说明蝙蝠比例和本土种数量。
making it... 是现在分词结果状语，it 指 Madagascar。
one of the most important regions 后的 for 短语说明其重要性所在。

expressions.text: one of the most important regions

sentences.sentence: Co-leading an international team of scientists, Rocha found that several species of indigenous bats are taking advantage of habitat modification to hunt insects swarming above the country's rice fields.
sentences.translation: 罗查与他人共同带领一个国际科学家团队，发现几种本土蝙蝠正在利用栖息地改变，在该国稻田上方捕食成群飞舞的昆虫。

structure.text: Co-leading an international team of scientists
that several species of indigenous bats are taking advantage of habitat modification to hunt insects swarming above the country's rice fields
swarming above the country's rice fields

difficult_points: Co-leading... 是现在分词短语，补充说明 Rocha 在研究团队中的角色。
that 引导 found 的宾语从句，给出研究发现。
swarming above... 修饰 insects，说明这些昆虫在稻田上方成群飞舞。

sentences.sentence: They include the Malagasy mouse-eared bat, Major's long-fingered bat, the Malagasy white-bellied free-tailed bat and Peters' wrinkle-lipped bat.
sentences.translation: 这些蝙蝠包括马达加斯加鼠耳蝠、梅杰长指蝠、马达加斯加白腹游尾蝠和彼得皱唇蝠。

structure.text: the Malagasy mouse-eared bat, Major's long-fingered bat, the Malagasy white-bellied free-tailed bat and Peters' wrinkle-lipped bat

difficult_points: They 指上一句提到的 several species of indigenous bats。
include 后面列举四种蝙蝠名称。
多个带连字符的复合形容词共同修饰 bat，需要整体理解为物种名称。

sentences.sentence: 'These winner species are providing a valuable free service to Madagascar as biological pest suppressors,' says Rocha.
sentences.translation: “这些赢家物种正在作为生物害虫抑制者，为马达加斯加提供一种宝贵的免费服务，”罗查说。

structure.text: 'These winner species are providing a valuable free service to Madagascar as biological pest suppressors,'
a valuable free service to Madagascar

difficult_points: These winner species 指在栖息地改变中受益的蝙蝠物种。
as biological pest suppressors 说明它们提供服务时的功能身份。
says Rocha 是引语后的报道分句。

sentences.sentence: 'We found that six species of bat are preying on rice pests, including the paddy swarming caterpillar and grass webworm.
sentences.translation: “我们发现，有六种蝙蝠正在捕食稻田害虫，包括稻田群集毛虫和草地网虫。

structure.text: that six species of bat are preying on rice pests, including the paddy swarming caterpillar and grass webworm
including the paddy swarming caterpillar and grass webworm

difficult_points: that 引导 found 的宾语从句，说明研究发现的内容。
are preying on 是现在进行时，强调捕食行为正在发生。
including 后列举 rice pests 的具体种类。

sentences.sentence: The damage which these insects cause puts the island's farmers under huge financial pressure and that encourages deforestation.'
sentences.translation: 这些昆虫造成的破坏使岛上的农民承受巨大的经济压力，而这又助长了森林砍伐。”

structure.text: The damage which these insects cause
the island's farmers under huge financial pressure

difficult_points: which these insects cause 是定语从句，修饰 The damage。
puts...under huge financial pressure 表示“使……承受巨大经济压力”。
that 指前半句所说的经济压力，说明它进一步鼓励砍伐森林。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使承受巨大的经济压力

sentences.sentence: The study, now published in the journal Agriculture, Ecosystems and Environment, set out to investigate the feeding activity of insectivorous bats in the farmland bordering the Ranomafana National Park in the southeast of the country.
sentences.translation: 这项如今发表在《农业、生态系统与环境》期刊上的研究，旨在调查该国东南部拉努马法纳国家公园边缘农田中食虫蝙蝠的觅食活动。

structure.text: now published in the journal Agriculture, Ecosystems and Environment
the feeding activity of insectivorous bats in the farmland bordering the Ranomafana National Park
bordering the Ranomafana National Park in the southeast of the country

difficult_points: 两个逗号之间的 now published... 是插入式过去分词短语，补充说明研究发表信息。
set out to investigate 表示研究的目的或任务。
bordering the Ranomafana National Park 修饰 farmland，说明农田位置。

sentences.sentence: Rocha and his team used state-of-the-art ultrasonic recorders to record over a thousand bat 'feeding buzzes' (echolocation sequences used by bats to target their prey) at 54 sites, in order to identify the favourite feeding spots of the bats.
sentences.translation: 罗查和他的团队使用最先进的超声波记录仪，在54个地点记录了一千多次蝙蝠的“觅食嗡鸣”（蝙蝠用来锁定猎物的回声定位序列），以确定蝙蝠最喜欢的觅食地点。

structure.text: to record over a thousand bat 'feeding buzzes'
echolocation sequences used by bats to target their prey
in order to identify the favourite feeding spots of the bats

difficult_points: to record... 表示使用记录仪的直接目的。
括号内容解释 feeding buzzes 是什么，属于同位说明。
in order to identify... 是目的状语，说明记录这些声音的研究目的。

sentences.sentence: They next used DNA barcoding techniques to analyse droppings collected from bats at the different sites.
sentences.translation: 随后，他们使用 DNA 条形码技术分析了从不同地点的蝙蝠处收集到的粪便。

structure.text: to analyse droppings collected from bats at the different sites
droppings collected from bats at the different sites
collected from bats at the different sites

difficult_points: They 指 Rocha and his team。
next 表示研究步骤的先后顺序。
collected from bats... 是过去分词短语，修饰 droppings。

sentences.sentence: The recordings revealed that bat activity over rice fields was much higher than it was in continuous forest – seven times higher over rice fields which were on flat ground, and sixteen times higher over fields on the sides of hills – leaving no doubt that the animals are preferentially foraging in these man-made ecosystems.
sentences.translation: 这些录音显示，稻田上方的蝙蝠活动远高于连续森林中的活动——平地稻田上方高出七倍，山坡田地上方高出十六倍——这毫无疑问地表明，这些动物更偏好在这些人造生态系统中觅食。

structure.text: that bat activity over rice fields was much higher than it was in continuous forest
seven times higher over rice fields which were on flat ground, and sixteen times higher over fields on the sides of hills
leaving no doubt that the animals are preferentially foraging in these man-made ecosystems

difficult_points: that 引导 revealed 的宾语从句，说明录音揭示的核心发现。
破折号中间的内容给出 two comparisons，具体量化稻田与森林的差异。
leaving no doubt... 是现在分词结果状语，表示这些数据清楚说明蝙蝠偏好人造生态系统。

sentences.sentence: The researchers suggest that the bats favour these fields because lack of water and nutrient run-off make these crops more susceptible to insect pest infestations.
sentences.translation: 研究人员认为，蝙蝠偏好这些田地，是因为缺水和养分流失使这些作物更容易受到害虫侵扰。

structure.text: that the bats favour these fields because lack of water and nutrient run-off make these crops more susceptible to insect pest infestations
because lack of water and nutrient run-off make these crops more susceptible to insect pest infestations
make these crops more susceptible to insect pest infestations

difficult_points: that 引导 suggest 的宾语从句，给出研究人员的解释。
because 引导原因状语从句，说明蝙蝠偏好这些田地的原因。
make these crops more susceptible to... 是“make + 宾语 + 宾补”结构。

sentences.sentence: DNA analysis showed that all six species of bat had fed on economically important insect pests.
sentences.translation: DNA 分析显示，全部六种蝙蝠都曾捕食具有经济重要性的害虫。

structure.text: that all six species of bat had fed on economically important insect pests
had fed on economically important insect pests

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 DNA 分析的结果。
had fed on 使用过去完成时，表示在分析之前已经发生的捕食行为。
economically important 修饰 insect pests，强调这些害虫会造成经济影响。

sentences.sentence: While the findings indicated that rice farming benefits most from the bats, the scientists also found indications that the bats were consuming pests of other crops, including the black twig borer (which infests coffee plants), the sugarcane cicada, the macadamia nut-borer, and the sober tabby (a pest of citrus fruits).
sentences.translation: 尽管研究结果表明水稻种植从蝙蝠那里受益最大，科学家们也发现迹象显示，蝙蝠还在捕食其他作物的害虫，包括黑枝蛀虫（侵害咖啡树）、甘蔗蝉、澳洲坚果蛀虫以及 sober tabby（一种柑橘类水果害虫）。

structure.text: While the findings indicated that rice farming benefits most from the bats
that rice farming benefits most from the bats
that the bats were consuming pests of other crops
including the black twig borer (which infests coffee plants), the sugarcane cicada, the macadamia nut-borer, and the sober tabby (a pest of citrus fruits)

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，表示“虽然水稻种植受益最大”。
found indications that... 中 that 引导同位语从句，解释 indications 的内容。
including 后列举 other crops 的害虫种类，括号提供补充说明。

sentences.sentence: 'The effectiveness of bats as pest controllers has already been proven in the USA and Catalonia,' said co-author James Kemp, from the University of Lisbon.
sentences.translation: “蝙蝠作为害虫控制者的有效性已在美国和加泰罗尼亚得到证明，”来自里斯本大学的共同作者詹姆斯·肯普说。

structure.text: 'The effectiveness of bats as pest controllers has already been proven in the USA and Catalonia,'
The effectiveness of bats as pest controllers

difficult_points: The effectiveness of bats as pest controllers 是引语中的主语，核心词是 effectiveness。
has already been proven 是现在完成时被动语态，表示证据已经形成。
from the University of Lisbon 补充说明 James Kemp 的所属机构。

sentences.sentence: 'But our study is the first to show this happening in Madagascar, where the stakes for both farmers and conservationists are so high.'
sentences.translation: “但我们的研究首次显示这种情况正在马达加斯加发生，而在那里，农民和自然保护者面临的利害关系都非常重大。”

structure.text: to show this happening in Madagascar
where the stakes for both farmers and conservationists are so high

difficult_points: the first to show 表示“第一个显示……的研究”。
this happening in Madagascar 中 this 指蝙蝠作为害虫控制者发挥作用。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Madagascar 的高风险背景。

sentences.sentence: Local people may have a further reason to be grateful to their bats.
sentences.translation: 当地人或许还有另一个理由感谢他们的蝙蝠。

structure.text: a further reason to be grateful to their bats
to be grateful to their bats

difficult_points: may have 表示推测或可能性，而不是确定断言。
a further reason 承接前文蝙蝠控虫的好处，提示还有额外益处。
to be grateful to their bats 修饰 reason，说明感谢的对象。

sentences.sentence: While the animal is often associated with spreading disease, Rocha and his team found evidence that Malagasy bats feed not just on crop pests but also on mosquitoes – carriers of malaria, Rift Valley fever virus and elephantiasis – as well as blackflies, which spread river blindness.
sentences.translation: 虽然蝙蝠这种动物常被认为与传播疾病有关，但罗查和他的团队发现证据表明，马达加斯加蝙蝠不仅捕食作物害虫，也捕食蚊子——疟疾、裂谷热病毒和象皮病的携带者——以及传播河盲症的黑蝇。

structure.text: While the animal is often associated with spreading disease
Rocha and his team found evidence
that Malagasy bats feed not just on crop pests but also on mosquitoes
carriers of malaria, Rift Valley fever virus and elephantiasis

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，先承认蝙蝠常与传播疾病相关。
that 引导同位语从句，解释 evidence 的具体内容。
not just...but also...as well as... 构成递进列举，说明蝙蝠捕食对象不止一种。

sentences.sentence: Rocha points out that the relationship is complicated.
sentences.translation: 罗查指出，这种关系很复杂。
difficult_points: points out 表示作者引用罗查对问题的提醒或强调。
that 引导宾语从句，说明他指出的内容。
the relationship 指当地人与蝙蝠之间既依赖又冲突的关系。

sentences.sentence: When food is scarce, bats become a crucial source of protein for local people.
sentences.translation: 当食物短缺时，蝙蝠会成为当地人重要的蛋白质来源。

structure.text: bats become a crucial source of protein for local people

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明蝙蝠被食用的背景条件。
become 后接名词短语作表语，表示身份或作用的变化。
for local people 表明这种蛋白质来源是对当地人而言的。

sentences.sentence: Even the children will hunt them.
sentences.translation: 甚至孩子们也会猎捕它们。
difficult_points: Even 表示程度超出预期，强调连孩子也会参与猎捕。
them 指上一句中的 bats。
will 在这里描述习惯性或可能发生的行为，不一定只表示未来。

sentences.sentence: And as well as roosting in trees, the bats sometimes roost in buildings, but are not welcomed there because they make them unclean.
sentences.translation: 而且，除了栖息在树上，这些蝙蝠有时也栖息在建筑物里，但它们在那里并不受欢迎，因为它们会把建筑弄脏。

structure.text: as well as roosting in trees
the bats sometimes roost in buildings

difficult_points: as well as roosting in trees 表示“除了栖息在树上之外”。
but 后省略了主语 the bats，与前半句共享主语。
because 从句中的第一个 they 指蝙蝠，them 指建筑物或其内部空间。

sentences.sentence: At the same time, however, they are associated with sacred caves and the ancestors, so they can be viewed as beings between worlds, which makes them very significant in the culture of the people.
sentences.translation: 然而与此同时，它们又与神圣洞穴和祖先联系在一起，因此被看作处在不同世界之间的存在，这使它们在当地人的文化中非常重要。

structure.text: they are associated with sacred caves and the ancestors
so they can be viewed as beings between worlds
which makes them very significant in the culture of the people

difficult_points: At the same time, however 表示与前文“不受欢迎”形成转折。
be associated with 在这里表示文化和宗教层面的联系。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面蝙蝠被视为跨界存在这一整件事。

sentences.sentence: And one potential problem is that while these bats are benefiting from farming, at the same time deforestation is reducing the places where they can roost, which could have long-term effects on their numbers.
sentences.translation: 而一个潜在问题是，虽然这些蝙蝠正从农业中受益，但与此同时森林砍伐正在减少它们可以栖息的地方，这可能会对它们的数量产生长期影响。

structure.text: that while these bats are benefiting from farming, at the same time deforestation is reducing the places where they can roost
which could have long-term effects on their numbers

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，解释 one potential problem 的具体内容。
while 引导让步状语从句，突出“受益”和“栖息地减少”同时存在。
which 指前面森林砍伐减少栖息地这一情况，说明其长期后果。

sentences.sentence: Rocha says, 'With the right help, we hope that farmers can promote this mutually beneficial relationship by installing bat houses.'
sentences.translation: 罗查说：“在适当帮助下，我们希望农民能够通过安装蝙蝠屋来促进这种互利关系。”

structure.text: 'With the right help, we hope that farmers can promote this mutually beneficial relationship by installing bat houses.'
that farmers can promote this mutually beneficial relationship

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语，Rocha says 是报道分句。
that 引导 hope 的宾语从句，说明希望农民做到的事情。
by installing bat houses 表示促进互利关系的方式。

sentences.sentence: Rocha and his colleagues believe that maximising bat populations can help to boost crop yields and promote sustainable livelihoods.
sentences.translation: 罗查和他的同事们认为，尽量增加蝙蝠数量可以帮助提高作物产量，并促进可持续生计。

structure.text: that maximising bat populations can help to boost crop yields and promote sustainable livelihoods
can help to boost crop yields and promote sustainable livelihoods

difficult_points: that 引导 believe 的宾语从句，表达研究团队的判断。
maximising bat populations 是动名词短语，作从句主语。
boost crop yields 与 promote sustainable livelihoods 是并列结果。

sentences.sentence: The team is now calling for further research to quantify this contribution.
sentences.translation: 该团队如今呼吁开展进一步研究，以量化这一贡献。
difficult_points: is now calling for 使用现在进行时，表示研究团队当前正在倡议。
further research 指后续研究，而不是已经完成的研究。
to quantify this contribution 表示进一步研究的目的。

sentences.sentence: 'I'm very optimistic,' says Rocha.
sentences.translation: “我非常乐观，”罗查说。
difficult_points: I'm 是 I am 的缩写，直接表达 Rocha 的态度。
very optimistic 表示对后续保护和恢复前景的积极判断。
says Rocha 是引语后的报道分句。

sentences.sentence: 'If we give nature a hand, we can speed up the process of regeneration.'
sentences.translation: “如果我们助自然一臂之力，就能加快再生的过程。”

structure.text: If we give nature a hand
we can speed up the process of regeneration
speed up the process of regeneration

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，提出能够加快再生的条件。
give nature a hand 是拟人化表达，表示帮助自然恢复。
speed up 表示加快，宾语是 the process of regeneration。
